title: Tokimi's Toolshed
description: Tokimi's Toolshed adds a variety of new multi-block tools to enhance your mining and gathering experience!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac5a94860a9e2fb79d23d5addb3905793682c44.webp) ## Dig smarter, not harder.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16a5cc564c759f549ed33cc261b4e071f5a739b5.png)
# 📝About **Tokimi's Toolshed** adds a variety of new multi-block tools to enhance your mining and gathering experience! **Hammers** mine a 3x3 area of stone, **Excavators** dig a 3x3 area of dirt and gravel, **Scythes** harvest a 3x3 area of crops and plants/till in a 3x3 as well, **Lumber Axes** chop down entire trees with accelerated leaf decay, and **Clippers** work like shears just in a 3x3 area. Also includes a **Copper Bucket** which weathers over usage, a **Trowel** for random block placement, and an **Abacus** for measuring distances. All tools come in every vanilla tier, with optional modded support for **Copper** and **Obsidian** variants!\
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09224f5b8e4bc07833816e9fb8b90d9bcc2cc6b.png)
# 🔨How It Works Just craft them directly using standard materials! Each tool follows the vanilla tier progression, from wood all the way to netherite. _Recipes for every variant are shown below with images for easy reference._
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d838b481fc1005e7aa7de4bb3b398679a4d4beef.gif) ![Smithing Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7052cfdb96af7ba683b7319505fcb05f3c65078b.gif) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa1427400d3deb3e661fa59f8670f494f65066c_0.webp)
# 🌟Features - Balanced for vanilla gameplay (powerful, but not overpowered.) - Crisp, vanilla-styled textures that blend perfectly with Minecraft’s aesthetic. - Simple crafting system (no complex upgrades or extra steps.)
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86467733df7a0add571ae6a66c91c0dec64bbd1.png)
🔧 Modded Support - [Obsidian Equipment Reworked](https://modrinth.com/mod/obsidian-equipment-reworked) - [Copper Age Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age) - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7885867beca152e599134c335425233390c3cf6.png)
# ❓FAQ **Q:** What versions does it support? **A:** Currently works on Minecraft 1.20.1, all of 1.21, and 26.1 (Fabric only).
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16a5cc564c759f549ed33cc261b4e071f5a739b5.png)
**Q:** Will there be updates? **A:** Yes! We plan to port to future Minecraft versions, but no backports.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09224f5b8e4bc07833816e9fb8b90d9bcc2cc6b.png)
**Q:** Will there be a Forge version? **A:** Not yet, I'm open to it.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa1427400d3deb3e661fa59f8670f494f65066c_0.webp)
**Q:** Can I include this in my modpack? **A:** Absolutely! Feel free to include it in any modpack.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86467733df7a0add571ae6a66c91c0dec64bbd1.png)
**Q:** How can I support the development? **A:** You can support us on Patreon or Ko-fi to help us continue creating cozy, high-quality mods.
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7885867beca152e599134c335425233390c3cf6.png)
# 💬 Join the Community Need help or want to chat with other players? Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/qHB5D9uzHe
